overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game. The player character walks along a deserted rural mountain highway, passing road signs and an abandoned police car, then transitions onto a dirt trail leading uphill through dry grassland toward a large distinctive tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural mountain highway with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved road toward a yellow tunnel warning sign

entered.detail: weathered wooden post fence running parallel to the left side of the road
yellow diamond-shaped road sign with black tunnel symbol
wooden utility poles with electrical wires running along the right side
large rocky mountain formations with sparse trees in the background
cracked asphalt pavement with yellow dividing lines and grass growing through cracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cracked asphalt highway bordered by a wooden fence on the left and power lines on the right. Rocky mountains rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky, while a yellow tunnel warning sign approaches in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with abandoned vehicle on shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road past the tunnel sign and approaching an abandoned vehicle

entered.detail: derelict black and white police sedan parked on the right roadside with doors open

segments.scene_description: The character passes the tunnel warning sign and continues along the highway where the wooden fence ends. An abandoned police car becomes visible on the right shoulder, growing larger as the character approaches and passes it.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail leading uphill through dry grassland

events.description: ground surface transitions from asphalt pavement to dirt trail
passing white speed limit 25 sign on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the dirt path toward a large distinctive tree on the right

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel path with dry grass on the edges leading uphill
white rectangular regulatory sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 25
massive distinctive tree with thick trunk and spreading canopy on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from pavement to dirt as the character begins ascending a hillside trail. A speed limit 25 sign stands on the left while a large distinctive tree grows larger on the right. The sun begins to create a glare from behind the tree as the character continues uphill through the dry grassland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain highway that gradually transitions into a steep climb through dry grassland. It begins with the character walking along cracked asphalt bordered by a wooden fence and power lines, with rocky mountains looming under a partly cloudy sky. As the character passes a yellow tunnel warning sign, the fence ends and the camera approaches an abandoned police car resting on the right shoulder. The scene then shifts as the pavement gives way to a dirt trail, leading the character past a speed limit sign and uphill toward a large, distinctive tree. Finally, the terrain opens into a hillside of dry grass while the sun creates a bright glare from behind the tree as the ascent continues.
